$comment: Curated static selection for review-docs-01. document-workspace-01 supplies the workspace baseline; the implementation wires launch-themed local seed state, a saved-state Save/Discard cycle backed by localStorage, and comment deletion via a manage-comments list, across its blocks.

assumptions: document-workspace-01 is the stocked document-workspace screen pattern and its editor, comment, and attachment blocks fit the application.

The editor, comment thread, and file-upload area are the stocked blocks reused directly with local state; comment deletion is surfaced through a separate manage-comments list since comment-thread-01 is not modified.
All content derives from one local seed document plus localStorage-persisted edits, comments, and attachments, restored on reload and revertible via Discard changes.
risks: No document store, review service, file backend, or backend persistence is connected; Save writes to this browser's localStorage only.
The seed does not model loading, error, permission, or concurrent-edit states.
Clearing site data or using a different browser loses the saved document; there is no recovery path back to the original seed once saved over.
